hotels.description_en:
Prime Location: IracemaГўв‚¬в„ўs Homes Гўв‚¬вЂњ Ipanema in Rio de Janeiro offers a 3-minute walk to Ipanema Beach and is 13 km from Santos Dumont Airport. Nearby attractions include Rodrigo de Freitas Lake (3.9 km), Rio de Janeiro Botanical Gardens (4 km), and Sugarloaf Mountain (10 km).
